final:
module parallel_load_shift_register (
    input rst,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] q
);

    always @(posedge rst) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 8'b0;
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= data_in;
        end else begin
            q <= {q[6:0], 1'b0};
        end
    end

endmodule
